creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
Now I have rewritten the www/openacs and www/openacs-dotlrn ports, too.
See everything under:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/
<http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/www/aolserver>

It is downloadable as a tarball:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/myports.tar.gz
<http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/www/aolserver>

It includes:
archivers/aolserver-nszlib
databases/aolserver-nsmysql
databases/aolserver-nspostgres
graphics/aolserver-nsgd
security/aolserver-nsencrypt
security/aolserver-nsmcrypt
security/aolserver-nsmhash
security/aolserver-nsopenssl
security/aolserver-nssha1
www/aolserver
www/aolserver-nscache
www/openacs
www/openacs-dotlrn

I might add new aolserver module ports in the future.

Aldert, please take a look at my proposal for new openacs and dotlrn ports.
They work with PostgreSQL 7.4, 8.0 and 8.1, too.
